testcase.name: test_national_standings_works

failure.message: AssertionError: Standings should be a list assert False + where False = isinstance({'current_matchday': 22, 'entries': [{'created_at': None, 'current_week_points': 0, 'is_current_user': False, 'jolly_used': 1, ...}, {'created_at': None, 'current_week_points': 0, 'is_current_user': True, 'jolly_used': 0, ...}, {'created_at': None, 'current_week_points': 0, 'is_current_user': False, 'jolly_used': 1, ...}, {'created_at': '', 'current_week_points': 0, 'is_current_user': False, 'jolly_used': 0, ...}, {'created_at': '', 'current_week_points': 0, 'is_current_user': False, 'jolly_used': 0, ...}, {'created_at': '', 'current_week_points': 0, 'is_current_user': False, 'jolly_used': 0, ...}, ...], 'league_id': 'f1373417-43aa-4043-b6a2-125873181c95', 'league_name': 'Lega Nazionale FantaPronostic', ...}, list)

testcase.failure: backend/tests/test_api_league_fixtures_import.py:120: in test_national_standings_works assert isinstance(data, list), "Standings should be a list" E AssertionError: Standings should be a list E assert False E + where False = isinstance({'current_matchday': 22, 'entries': [{'created_at': None, 'current_week_points': 0, 'is_current_user': False, 'jolly_used': 1, ...}, {'created_at': None, 'current_week_points': 0, 'is_current_user': True, 'jolly_used': 0, ...}, {'created_at': None, 'current_week_points': 0, 'is_current_user': False, 'jolly_used': 1, ...}, {'created_at': '', 'current_week_points': 0, 'is_current_user': False, 'jolly_used': 0, ...}, {'created_at': '', 'current_week_points': 0, 'is_current_user': False, 'jolly_used': 0, ...}, {'created_at': '', 'current_week_points': 0, 'is_current_user': False, 'jolly_used': 0, ...}, ...], 'league_id': 'f1373417-43aa-4043-b6a2-125873181c95', 'league_name': 'Lega Nazionale FantaPronostic', ...}, list)
